name: @papercusp/memory
description: mem0-backed persistent memory store core: the mem0ai/oss wrapper, a canonical pgvector store (one memory_canonical row per fact, per-embedder vec tables), a worker-thread-isolated local BGE embedder, and the cross-model re-embed pass. Host-agnostic — the embedded-pg admin URL, LLM credentials, the resolved embedder (pre-built embed fn + mode), and the optional adaptive-instruction hook are injected via configureMemory(). mem0 owns its own pg.Client, so no shared transaction handle is injected. Zero @papercusp/@restart runtime deps.
